source_reference.name: Superpowers
source_reference.notes: Adapted locally to enforce specification-first, TDD-oriented loops, clear verification steps, and safe execution guardrails.

phases.purpose: Engage to clarify requirements, explore design alternatives, map edge cases, and finalize specification before writing code.
Decompose the goal into short, atomic task steps (2-5 mins each) with clear verification checkpoints.
Enforce strict Red-Green-Refactor development. A failing test must be run/verified before code implementation begins.
Carry out changes in isolation while adhering to the agreed steps and maintaining minimal code additions.
Self-review of changes against the specification, style guides, and codebase patterns.
Run the complete test suite to verify no regressions and prepare branch/state summary.

guardrails: Protect secrets, private keys, Telegram data, and raw production logs from prompts.
Do not execute trades directly from LLM-generated recommendations.
All code changes must pass localized unit tests prior to main workspace integration.
Maintain high modularity and separate concerns across all adapters.
